data: Creamy Tomato Basil Soup: Saute 1 chopped onion and 4 minced garlic cloves in 2 tbsp olive oil. Add two 28oz cans of crushed tomatoes, 4 cups vegetable broth, and a handful of fresh basil. Simmer for 20 minutes, then blend until perfectly smooth. Stir in 1/2 cup heavy cream and season with black pepper.
